nasb.text: So Saul died for his trespass which he committed against the Lord, because of the word of the Lord which he did not keep; and also because he asked counsel of a medium, making inquiry of it,

esv.text: So Saul died for his breach of faith. He broke faith with the Lord in that he did not keep the command of the Lord, and also consulted a medium, seeking guidance.

cnv.text: 掃羅死了，因為他悖逆耶和華，沒有聽從他的話，也因為他去求問那交鬼的，

ccb.text: 扫罗死了，因为他对耶和华不忠，不听从祂的教诲，甚至去求问灵媒，
